recent_projects.name: laddr
recent_projects.summary: Laddr is a framework to build, run, and scale multi-agent systems that communicate, delegate, and execute tasks in parallel. Each agent can run multiple workers, powered by a queue-based delegation system that ensures horizontal scalability and resilience.
